name: Chenghe Acquisition III Co.
summary: Chenghe Acquisition III Co. is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company. Its sole business purpose is to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses, targeting Asian markets or global businesses with a presence in Asia, particularly in e-commerce and consumer sectors. It completed its IPO on September 17, 2025, raising $126.5 million in gross proceeds.

products.name: Public Units
products.description: IPO units each consisting of one Class A Ordinary Share and one-half of one redeemable Public Warrant, sold at $10.00 per unit.

products.name: Private Placement Units
products.description: Units sold in a private placement to co-sponsors and underwriters at $10.00 per unit, consisting of shares and warrants.

partnerships.description: Underwriter for the IPO who also purchased 126,500 Private Placement Units concurrently with IPO closing.
Acts as trustee for the trust account established for the benefit of public shareholders.
Affiliated investment holding company with advisory practice; co-sponsors are affiliated with Chenghe Group.
